description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a simple rectangular footprint, set on a grassy plot with a raised wooden deck extending from the front and side. The house features a steep gable roof in dark gray, contrasting with its white exterior walls. Large windows dominate the front facade, providing ample natural light to the main living area, while smaller windows are distributed asymmetrically on the other sides. A covered porch with wooden posts is attached to one side, offering a sheltered outdoor space. The rear of the house includes double glass doors opening onto a smaller deck, suggesting easy access to the backyard. The overall design is clean and minimalistic, with a focus on functional outdoor living spaces.
description: A modern two-story house with a steep gable roof, large front windows, white walls, and wooden decks on both the front and rear. Features include a covered side porch and double glass doors at the back.
description_view_0: Front view showing large picture windows, the main wooden deck, and the covered side porch.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting double glass doors, a smaller deck, and minimal window openings.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the gable end with a single horizontal window and the covered porch structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the covered porch entrance and the main house volume with minimal fenestration.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows on the front
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry features a covered porch with wooden posts, accessed via the front deck, and a modern door with minimal ornamentation.
